allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: mark GBP Day 3 published, reschedule Day 4 to 17 May' -m '- Day 3 \(Ayushman Bharat Coverage\) confirmed live on Google Business Profile - added PUBLISHED badge. *)
Bash(git commit -m 'seo: fix site-wide mojibake, trim long blog titles, add missing OG tags' -m 'On-Page SEO pass \(HOTH audit, category 1\): *)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://chart.googleapis.com/chart?chs=200x200&cht=qr&chl=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hopehospital.com%2Freview&choe=UTF-8" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)  Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(python -c "import qrcode; print\('python qrcode: yes'\)" 2>$null; if\(-not $?\){ "python qrcode: no" }; python -c "import segno; print\('segno: yes'\)" 2>$null; if\(-not $?\){ "segno: no" })
PowerShell(python -m pip install segno --quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; python -c "import segno; print\('segno ready', segno.__version__\)")

PowerShell(python -m pip install pillow --quiet 2>$null; python -c "from PIL import Image; p=r'C:\\Users\\hope4\\Desktop\\hope-review-card.png'; im=Image.open\(p\); w,h=im.size; im.crop\(\(0,0,w,h-150\)\).save\(p\); print\('trimmed to', Image.open\(p\).size\)")
PowerShell(Start-Process "https://www.hopehospital.com/review-card.html"; Start-Process "https://www.hopehospital.com/review"; "opened live review-card and review pages")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\hope4\\Documents\\hopehospital\\hopehospital.com"; Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern "footer" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object LineNumber | Select-Object -First 3; "---- review/google links in index.html ----"; Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern '/review|writereview|g\\.page|Review us|Leave a' | Select-Object LineNumber, @{N='snippet';E={$_.Line.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$_.Line.Length-120\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\hope4\\Documents\\hopehospital\\hopehospital.com"; $m = Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern "<footer" -AllMatches; foreach\($x in $m\){ "line $\($x.LineNumber\), col $\($x.Matches[0].Index\), linelen $\($x.Line.Length\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\hope4\\Documents\\hopehospital\\hopehospital.com"; "=== reviewCount / ratingValue in index.html ==="; Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern 'reviewCount|ratingValue' | ForEach-Object { foreach\($m in $_.Matches\){ $i=$m.Index; $_.Line.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$i-10\),[Math]::Min\(60,$_.Line.Length-[Math]::Max\(0,$i-10\)\)\) } } | Select-Object -First 10)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:'\); [print\(' ',k,'->',v\) for k,v in d.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*serve*3000*'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; if\(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\){ '\\''still up'\\'' } else { '\\''port 3000 free'\\'' }')

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/blog/ayushman-bharat-surgery-list-2026.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { $hasNew = $r.Content -match 'id="rirs-ayushman"'; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Has new content \(rirs-ayushman anchor\): $hasNew"; "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } else { "Could not reach localhost:3000" })
PowerShell(Start-Process 'https://dmarcian.com/dmarc-inspector/?domain=hopehospital.com'; "Opened dmarcian DMARC Inspector for hopehospital.com")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem departments\\nephrology.html, departments\\oncology.html, services\\cancer-treatment-nagpur.html, blog\\free-cancer-treatment-nagpur-ayushman-bharat-2026.html, blog\\ayushman-bharat-surgery-list-2026.html | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}})
PowerShell($m = "Hope Hospital Nagpur expands 2026 care — maternity, NICU, neurosurgery, cardiac, cancer & kidney transplant, covered under Ayushman Bharat. NABH-accredited."; $m.Length)

PowerShell($t = "Oncology & Cancer Treatment in Nagpur | Hope Hospital"; $m = "Hope Hospital's Oncology Dept in Nagpur — surgical oncology, chemotherapy, screening & palliative care, covered under Ayushman Bharat for eligible cardholders."; "title: $\($t.Length\)"; "meta: $\($m.Length\)")

PowerShell($t1 = "Brain Tumor & Spine Surgery in Nagpur | Cost 2026"; $t2 = "Brain Tumor & Spine Surgery in Nagpur | Hope Hospital"; $m = "Brain tumor & spine surgery, stroke & neurovascular care in Nagpur at NABH Hope Hospital — covered under Ayushman Bharat for eligible cardholders. 24/7 emergency."; $og = "Brain tumor surgery, spine surgery & neurovascular treatment at NABH-accredited Hope Hospital Nagpur — covered under Ayushman Bharat for eligible cardholders."; "t1: $\($t1.Length\)"; "t2: $\($t2.Length\)"; "meta: $\($m.Length\)"; "og: $\($og.Length\)")
PowerShell($m = "Brain tumor & spine surgery, stroke & neurovascular care in Nagpur at NABH Hope Hospital — covered under Ayushman Bharat for eligible cardholders."; "meta: $\($m.Length\)")

PowerShell($kt = "Knee Replacement in Nagpur | Dr. B.K. Murali | Hope Hospital"; $km = "Best knee replacement in Nagpur at NABH Hope Hospital — Dr. B.K. Murali, 5000+ surgeries. Covered under Ayushman Bharat for eligible cardholders."; $ko = "Expert knee replacement surgery in Nagpur by Dr. B.K. Murali at NABH-accredited Hope Hospital — covered under Ayushman Bharat for eligible patients."; $nt = "Best Nephrologist & Kidney Specialist in Nagpur"; "knee title: $\($kt.Length\)"; "knee meta: $\($km.Length\)"; "knee og: $\($ko.Length\)"; "neph title: $\($nt.Length\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path } } else { "Port 3000 is FREE" })
